subject: pinctrl: baytrail: Fix potential NULL pointer dereference
notes: Pattern fit: missing NULL check after devm_kcalloc in byt_gpio_probe. Verifier-v1 OK on second POC (first POC had count mismatches: F1.acq=6/F1.rel=1 vs seed 0/0). Final POC uses devm_kcalloc only (not in verifier's acquire list) and 1 main() return + minimal-pair to align counts to seed (acq=0/rel=0/goto=0/ret=5/if=4). All 4 predicates compiled and validated on POC mini-DB first try. Final query fires on byt_gpio_probe_buggy only; silent on byt_gpio_probe_fixed. buggy_fires=true, fixed_fires=false, fp_fires=false.
